languages.text: {n}Капитан-интендант Дунавски вещает звонко и четко, словно на параде.{/n} "Веками мы ждали этого момента, надеялись увидеть его. И вот мы здесь. Мы выжили, от Первого Призыва и до нашего!"

{n}Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski's voice rings out crisp and clear, as if on parade.{/n} "For centuries, we have awaited this moment, hoping to witness it. And now we are here. We have survived, from the First Call-Up unto our own!"
languages.original_text: {n}Капитан-интендант Дунавски вещает звонко и четко, словно на параде.{/n} "Веками мы ждали этого момента, надеялись увидеть его. И вот мы здесь. Мы выжили, от Первого Призыва и до нашего!"

languages.text: {n}军需官上尉杜纳芙斯卡的声音就像在阅兵场上一样清脆响亮。{/n}“数个世纪以来，我们一直在等待这一刻，盼望亲眼见证它。现在我们终于等到了。从初代征召者直到如今这一代，我们挺过来了！”
languages.original_text: {n}Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski's voice rings out crisp and clear, as if on parade.{/n} "For centuries, we have awaited this moment, hoping to witness it. And now we are here. We have survived, from the First Call-Up unto our own!"

traits.locale_text: {n}军需官上尉杜纳芙斯卡的声音就像在阅兵场上一样清脆响亮。{/n}“数个世纪以来，我们一直在等待这一刻，盼望亲眼见证它。现在我们终于等到了。从初代征召者直到如今这一代，我们挺过来了！”

languages.text: {n}Levazımcı Yüzbaşı Dunawski'nin sesi, sanki bir geçit törenindeymiş gibi net ve berrak bir şekilde çınlıyor.{/n} "Yüzyıllardır bu anı bekledik, şahit olmayı umduk. İşte buradayız. İlk Sevk Grubu'ndan bu yana hayatta kaldık!"
languages.original_text: {n}Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski's voice rings out crisp and clear, as if on parade.{/n} "For centuries, we have awaited this moment, hoping to witness it. And now we are here. We have survived, from the First Call-Up unto our own!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Levazımcı Yüzbaşı Dunawski'nin sesi, sanki bir geçit törenindeymiş gibi net ve berrak bir şekilde çınlıyor.{/n} "Yüzyıllardır bu anı bekledik, şahit olmayı umduk. İşte buradayız. İlk Sevk Grubu'ndan bu yana hayatta kaldık!"

languages.text: {n}La voix de la capitaine-quartier-maître Dunawski résonne haut et fort, captant l'attention.{/n} « Nous avons espéré voir ce jour arriver des siècles durant. Cette fois, nous y sommes. Nous avons survécu, de la Première Mobilisation à nos jours ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski's voice rings out crisp and clear, as if on parade.{/n} "For centuries, we have awaited this moment, hoping to witness it. And now we are here. We have survived, from the First Call-Up unto our own!"

traits.locale_text: {n}La voix de la capitaine-quartier-maître Dunawski résonne haut et fort, captant l'attention.{/n} « Nous avons espéré voir ce jour arriver des siècles durant. Cette fois, nous y sommes. Nous avons survécu, de la Première Mobilisation à nos jours ! »

languages.text: {n}La voz de la capitana intendente Dunawski resuena con total claridad, como si estuviera en un desfile.{/n} «Durante siglos, hemos esperado este momento y hemos soñado con presenciarlo. Aquí estamos. ¡Hemos sobrevivido, desde el primer llamado hasta el nuestro!».
languages.original_text: {n}Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski's voice rings out crisp and clear, as if on parade.{/n} "For centuries, we have awaited this moment, hoping to witness it. And now we are here. We have survived, from the First Call-Up unto our own!"

traits.locale_text: {n}La voz de la capitana intendente Dunawski resuena con total claridad, como si estuviera en un desfile.{/n} «Durante siglos, hemos esperado este momento y hemos soñado con presenciarlo. Aquí estamos. ¡Hemos sobrevivido, desde el primer llamado hasta el nuestro!».

languages.text: {n}Die Stimme von Captain-Quartiermeisterin Dunawski ist klar und scharf, als nähme sie an einer Parade teil.{/n} "Wir haben seit Jahrhunderten gehofft, diesen Moment zu erleben. Und nun stehen wir hier. Wir haben überlebt, von der Ersten Einberufung bis heute!"
languages.original_text: {n}Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski's voice rings out crisp and clear, as if on parade.{/n} "For centuries, we have awaited this moment, hoping to witness it. And now we are here. We have survived, from the First Call-Up unto our own!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Stimme von Captain-Quartiermeisterin Dunawski ist klar und scharf, als nähme sie an einer Parade teil.{/n} "Wir haben seit Jahrhunderten gehofft, diesen Moment zu erleben. Und nun stehen wir hier. Wir haben überlebt, von der Ersten Einberufung bis heute!"

languages.text: {n}主計大尉ドゥナフスキーの声が、まるで閲兵式のように、きびきびと明瞭に響き渡る。{/n}「幾世紀ものあいだ、我々はこの瞬間を待ち望み、それを目にすることを願ってきた。そして今、我々はここにいる。最初の召集から、我々自身のそれに至るまで、我々は生き延びたのだ！」
languages.original_text: {n}Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski's voice rings out crisp and clear, as if on parade.{/n} "For centuries, we have awaited this moment, hoping to witness it. And now we are here. We have survived, from the First Call-Up unto our own!"

traits.locale_text: {n}主計大尉ドゥナフスキーの声が、まるで閲兵式のように、きびきびと明瞭に響き渡る。{/n}「幾世紀ものあいだ、我々はこの瞬間を待ち望み、それを目にすることを願ってきた。そして今、我々はここにいる。最初の召集から、我々自身のそれに至るまで、我々は生き延びたのだ！」
